query:
-- Community import: 177 posts -- Batch 1 of 3 (rows 1-60) INSERT INTO community_posts (category, sub_tags, title, body_html, author_id, is_pinned, is_featured, is_hidden, requires_confirmation, created_at, updated_at) SELECT category, sub_tags, title, body_html, author_id, is_pinned, is_featured, is_hidden, requires_confirmation, created_at, updated_at FROM ( SELECT 'supplier_news_deals' category, '[]' sub_tags, 'Attraction World Update' title, '

Attraction World Update — SeaWorld Parks, Orlando Magic Playoffs and more. Single Visit Ticket valid for 2026 visit dates. Limited time offer expiring 30th June 2026.

' body_html, NULL author_id, 0 is_pinned, 0 is_featured, 0 is_hidden, 0 requires_confirmation, 1776945600000 created_at, 1776945600000 updated_at UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','["cruise"]','P&O Cruises — New Regional Flights for Atlantic Island Fly Cruises','

P&O Cruises — Additional seats from Bournemouth, Edinburgh and Liverpool on select 26/27 Atlantic Island Fly cruises from 9am Monday 27th April.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','Somak Luxury Travel — Honouring Earth Day with South Africa','

Somak Luxury Travel — South African Safari & Mauritius packages from £4,450pp. Departs June & September 2026, British Airways flights included.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','🆕 NEW SUPPLIER: Shanti Travel — Tailor-Made Asia Holidays','

Shanti Travel specialises in tailor-made holidays across Asia (Sri Lanka, India, Indonesia, Vietnam, Japan). NETT rates, fully bespoke itineraries.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','🆕 NEW SUPPLIER: Vivi Magic Travels — France Tailor-Made Holidays','

Vivi Magic Travels (part of Magic Travels) specialises in bespoke France holidays. NETT rates, strong local knowledge, flexible for all travel styles.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','🆕 NEW SUPPLIER: Magic Arabia UAE — UAE & Middle East Holidays','

Magic Arabia UAE delivers bespoke travel across the UAE — Dubai, Abu Dhabi, desert adventures. NETT rates, fully tailor-made itineraries.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','XS2 Events — 14 New Sporting Events','

XS2 Events has added 14 new sporting events across Europe and the Americas — Super Bowl, Cheltenham Festival, NBA, premier golf tournaments.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','Gold Medal Weekly Update','

Gold Medal weekly update — don''t forget to register for Farebank rewards when making a booking!

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'events','[]','Magic Arabia Egypt & Marassi — Agent Webinar 6th May','

Magic Arabia Egypt and Marassi invite you to discover the beauty of Egypt''s North Coast. Webinar: Wednesday 6th May, 10:30am GMT. Register via Teams link.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','Domes Resorts — Adults Edition April Highlights','

Domes Resorts — adults-only collection in Greece: Domes Noruz Kassandra, Aulūs Elounda, Aulūs Chania. Ultra All-Inclusive options available.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','["cruise"]','Virgin Voyages — Semi-Annual Sale & Project Ruby AI','

Virgin Voyages Semi-Annual Sale: rates from £79 per Sailor per night. Up to $400 USD onboard credit on Med/Alaska voyages. Introducing Project Ruby AI platform.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'supplier_news_deals','[]','ATI Holidays — Namibian Fuel Surcharge Update','

ATI Holidays update on Namibian fuel surcharge. Namibia maintains 750 million litre reserve. Supply predominantly from Nigeria (80%).

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'events','[]','Sani/Ikos Agents that Brunch — London & St Albans September 2026','

Sani/Ikos Agents that Brunch events: St Albans 23rd Sept, London 24th Sept. Limited spaces — RSVP to tradesales@saniikosgroup.com.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1776945600000,1776945600000 UNION ALL SELECT 'events','[]','easyJet Holidays TOOT Cardiff — 3rd June 2026','

easyJet Holidays Team Orange On Tour (TOOT) Cardiff event. Date: 3rd June 2026, Steinbeck & Shaw, Greyfriars Road, Cardiff, 6:30pm. Register interest via form.

',NULL,0,0,0,0,1777032000000,1777032000000 ) t
